gist.headline: A brutalist makeover
gist.blurb: The model monitor just got a fresh redesign to match the main site's aesthetic. We've added audio and video models, squashed phantom model bugs, and made offline models much easier to spot.
gist.summary: The model monitor has been completely redesigned with a new UI, adding support for audio and video models while improving status visibility and sorting.
gist.impact: Users can now track the health of all model types—image, text, audio, and video—in a cleaner, color-coded interface that clearly highlights degraded or offline services.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot is the perfect fit for a 'model monitor' redesign. The robot's screen can display a colorful, organized grid representing the new color-coded modalities (lavender, periwinkle, mint, lime). Polly the bee can act as the 'designer' who just finished painting the UI.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the chunky Monitor Robot proudly displaying a newly organized, colorful grid on its CRT screen, featuring pastel lavender, periwinkle, mint, and lime green (#ecf874) blocks. Polly the bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a pixelated paintbrush. Soft warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
